name: Tax Credit for Returned Distilled Spirits

eligibility.description: Proprietors of distilled spirits plants who return tax-paid spirits for specific purposes like reconditioning or destruction.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows distilled spirits on which tax has already been paid to be returned to bonded premises for destruction, denaturation, or redistillation to qualify for a tax abatement, credit, or refund.
